RHOBEAR Captur'd — app rebuild to the FIREFLY pack (VISUAL lane)

8 mocks paired · Typekit sbv5bcv · accent #4B7AC8 · ground #0A0F14 · rendered via Edge headless

Desktop — Studio (filled)

2×2 step grid on one frosted-glass panel over the bear silhouette · blue accent · rokkitt labels + STEP badges · SaaS/Charon/16:9 selected · Film it enabled · Rho orb bottom-right.

Desktop — Studio (empty / first run)

Placeholders shown, nothing typed, Film it at 40% (disabled) · empty gallery = dashed box + constellation bear + ‘No demos yet / Film your first one’.

Desktop — Filming your demo

Constellation bear in pulse rings · summary chips · 65/35 progress bar · Scripting✓ › Navigating › Recording › Rendering · remaining line. (No ‘Stop filming’: there is no cancel endpoint — named seam, not faked.)

Desktop — Your demos

‘Film another demo’ (ghost) · demo rows: play thumb + title + url + template/voice/aspect pills + date·duration·status + Download/Watch/Re-film. Rich pills render only when /api/jobs provides url/template/voice/aspect/duration (named seam).

Mobile — Studio

Blue header band, centered RHOBEAR / Captur’d wordmark · STEP 1–4 stacked · 3-col shot cards · 3-col voice pills + aspect · Film it. (Preview framed on a wide canvas; real phones render full-bleed.)

Mobile — Your demos

Demo cards: video thumb + play, title, url, template/voice/aspect pills, status, Download/Watch. Matches the ln4kbp component board.

First-run onboarding (in-likeness)

No-mock survivor. The mobile onboarding mock (left) is its design source; rebuilt to the pack — birch-std ‘Captur’d’, teal eyebrow, #4B7AC8 accent, rokkitt heading. Gated: signed-in, once per user.

Brand identity sheet (reference only)

Mark source. Docroot ships the constellation (secondary) mark only; ink-roar head + standing bear PNGs are not in the tree — used at named seams so they swap in with no code change when added.
